name: Retry / Idempotency
description: Simulate worker crash after step 2 of 4; rerun; assert no duplicate external effects where idempotency key is defined. V1 documents 'not idempotent' for steps without keys.
notes: Steps with idempotency keys (step3: createPR uses PR branch as dedup) should not duplicate on retry. Steps without keys (step1, step2, step4) are documented as 'not idempotent in v1'. Worker crash recovery re-processes from the failed step, not from the beginning.
